variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 8122 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 8122 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 8122 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 309.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 289.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 231.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 51.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 32.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 11.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter C 31 007 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8122
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 31 007 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8122
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 310.0 mm, Dimension B: 230.0 mm, Dimension H: 52.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P607256 Air Filter, Panel Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8122
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P607256 Air Filter, Panel Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8122
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Cabin Air Filters? Filter irritants before they enter the vehicle cab to help operators breathe cleaner air. • High quality construction and tested to industry standards. • Durable, dependable and long-lasting. • Designed as a direct replacement for many OE applications.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF55826 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8122
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF55826 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8122
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF55826 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.
